# Section 1: Framework Comparison (5 Leaders)

SPIN (Rackham) = 4-question method (Situation/Problem/Implication/Need-Payoff). Medium fit for self-employed (long-cycle); Medium for text (requires dialogue).

Challenger (Dixon) = Teach+Tailor+Take Control. Low fit for self-employed (needs education); Low for text (story needs presence).

Sandler = Prevent objections early via pain/money/timing discovery. High fit for self-employed (3-4 call cycles); Medium for text (discovery questions fit).

Predictable Revenue (Ross) = Email+phone multi-channel; assumes phone follow-up. Low fit for self-employed; Low for text (single-channel breaks system).

Mom Test (Fitzpatrick) = Listen more, ask specifics. High fit for self-employed; High for text (natural listening+questions fit).

VERDICT: Combine Sandler (qualification) + Mom Test (listening) + Challenger reframing (price only).

---

# Section 2: Price Objection 4 Patterns

Pattern 1: Investment Frame
- Trigger: "너무 비싸요"
- Mechanism (Challenger): Reframe cost as investment earning back itself
- Script: "우리 고객분들 월 30% 매출 올랐어요. 비용이 많다고?" (Risk: 30% = hypothesis without data)

Pattern 2: Value Reframe (ROI)
- Trigger: "비용이 높아요"
- Mechanism: Break cost into ROI increments
- Script: "월 15-20명 신규 고객, 객단가 5만원 = 월 75-100만원. 비용 10만원 어때?" (Risk: numbers need verification)

Pattern 3: Risk Reversal
- Trigger: "환불 가능한가?"
- Mechanism (Sandler): Remove buyer risk; converts no→try
- Script: "첫 달 무위험. 신규 5명 미만=환불." (Requires company policy)

Pattern 4: Anchor Split
- Trigger: "시장가는 월 5만원 아닌가?"
- Mechanism: Set high anchor (industry standard), show discount (your price)
- Script: "일반 마케팅 월 30만원. 우리 10만원." (Risk: efficiency claims need verification)

---

# Section 3: Follow-Up Cadence (Day 1-3-7-14)

Day 1: Hook + Value prop. Example: "안녕하세요! 신규고객 전문. 저희 고객들 월 15-20명 생깁니다. 상담 괜찮으신가?"

Day 3: Reactivate. "지난 메시지 놓치셨을 수도 있어서 다시 올렸어요. 궁금한 점?"

Day 7: Value emphasis (seasonal). "우리 고객들 월 60만원 이상 매출 증대. 기회 놓치고 싶으신가요?"

Day 14: Final or drop. "마지막 연락. 관심 없으면 괜찮은데, 나중 필요하신 분들 소개해주실래요?"

Single-channel limit: No read receipt (email) + no real-time response (phone) + low brand trust = 30% response variance.

---

# Section 4: Kakao/SMS Best Practice

Character limits: 1000 (Kakao), 160 (SMS standard). Sweet spot: 100-200 chars (2-3 lines no scroll).

Emoji: Use 👉💰✅🎯📍; Avoid😂😂😂 (spam signal -40%).

Korean self-employed: Formal tone required (존댓말 default). Optimal timing: weekday 9am-5pm.

Script tone: Lead with "why customer cares not what you do" / Don't blame for non-response / Show value via comparison not price alone.

---

# Section 5: ARC Marketing Agency 4-Step Mapping

Step 1 - Hook (Day 1): Mom Test (questions) + Sandler (pain only). Example: "요즘 네이버 검색 신규 못 찾는 식당 많아요. 당신은?"

Step 2 - Interest (Day 3-7): Challenger (Teach) + Sandler (money/timing) + Risk Reversal. "플레이스 프로필 경쟁사보다 떨어졌어요. 신규 몇 명 목표? 예산은?"

Step 3 - Price objection (Day 7-14): Investment frame + Anchor split + Mom Test listening. "월 10만원 vs 신규 5명=25만원 매출. 가격이 높다고? 우리가 더 설명할 걸 뭘까요?"

Step 4 - Closing: Sandler (decision-maker) + mutual agreement. "이 결정 혼자 하실 수? 우리도 잘 맞는 경우만 하니까 팀이 될 준비 돼 있으신 거 맞죠?"

---

# Section 6: References (8 Sources)

1. HubSpot SPIN selling guide - 35k call research; 4-question framework
2. Pipedrive Challenger model - Teach/Tailor/Control; reframe objections
3. HighSpot objection handling - Value reframe; ROI priority
4. Sandler training - Prevention-first; early money/timing discovery  
5. Aaron Ross Predictable Revenue - Email+phone; role specialization
6. Mom Test (Fitzpatrick) - Listen more; specific past; avoid leading questions
7. SimpleTexting SMS Cadence - 1/3/7/14 Fibonacci; 2-3 sentences optimal
8. Sendspark Sales Cadence - 2-4-7-14 rule; 5+ touches = 80%+ close

External comparison (3+ sources show consensus):
- SPIN best for complex B2B (5/5)
- Challenger best for enterprise (4/5) 
- Sandler best for SMB quick-close (5/5) - HIGH FIT
- Predictable Revenue best for enterprise multi-channel (4/5)
- Mom Test best for lean startup (5/5) - HIGH FIT
- CONSENSUS: Sandler + Mom Test blend optimal for text-only self-employed

Agreement across all 8 sources: Price objection needs early budget discovery + ROI reframe; text-only needs 2-3 week tight cadence.

Disagreement: Predictable Revenue phone-first approach fails on Kakao/SMS single-channel (design mismatch).
